reviews.review_msg: She is an amazing prof, very qualified and respected, 3 midterms lowest score gets dropped. super engaging, always open to questions. One of the best profs at SFU

I have not had a prof this nice and genuine since starting at SFU. You can tell she is passionate and cares about her students. She also carries a lot of candor! One obnoxious student tried challenging her during lecture recently and she dealt with it gracefully.
